race about van art's in yellow but modest margins only separating the gc chances were there would they be taken on lumpy terrain as we ran just shy of 170 kilometers from san perenae to breve charrenzak a nasty series of tests right at the very end only one of the late lumps categorized the coat to rohack and a run for home but who would get there obviously some of lotte sadao had hoped to be in the break but i was shelled out on the major climb of the day sitting almost in the dead center vehemence was there for total energies legacy from group armor scarcity from euro x pro della place from archaea samsic and vermark from team dsm unfortunately dylan granovegan was tagged off yet again and would shed yet more time and another difficult day ahead for him phil bauhaus had withdrawn earlier in the day as well this race taking a toll or would it be a heavy one a heavy price to pay indeed for being in the breakaway they were functioning nicely as growner vegans group fell to seven minutes off the pace this five-man time trialling unit hit the final categorized coat with a margin of just around half a minute as they went over the top would it be enough well the chase was being laid there once again by trek segredo tom squinch doing much of the work in fact work rate was what the pelican were arguing about as vmware's just put his nose into the wind anybody interested in taking the day oh vernat was on the radio and indeed didn't exactly call off the troops but these guys out front were working so effectively when we came into the last 500 meters in sight of the line they could even afford a little bit of cat and mouse who would go first the answer was olivier legac yak attack on that final gentle curve unwinding at around about the 200 meter mark and it looked to be enough via most though was not giving up neither was scarzeth from you know x in the yellow who would hit the wind first from behind scarzeth like a sale unfortunately caught it and vmoz threw it to the line brilliant of the rest well bernard proving what might have been doing enough to take the green jersey or maintain his lead in that competition new leader overall alexis well a man who in 2015 won a stage of the tour de france up the murder tanya this time must have felt just as sweet 34 years of age now the veteran and he wins by a bike length out of a committed breakaway wonderful bmw's taking the day ahead of scarcity legacy rounded out with the bonus seconds for mark and de la place up there van out in sixth place out of haita paige venturini and rio bashanko who looked lively yellow jersey for the stage winner he couldn't quite believe it wonderful a real boost as well for total energies scar zeth trailing vmws by three seconds overall legacy four second margin van out five seconds of drift but of course in the green jersey polka dots on the back of pierre long who maintained his gap after taking all the climbs on day one and the best young rider the mark from dsm courtesy of his finish today stage three well this said to be a defining stage despite the alps coming next weekend a tough challenge to castrillo and that uphill calorie to test at the end could be a mountain sprint we shall wait a break away perhaps surely not some big names want victory and they want it now you
